pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; keeping the old 2.6.x parent would cause dependency conflicts and missing classes (javax.* vs jakarta.*) at compile time.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the java.version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The maven.compiler.source and target properties rely on this variable; without updating it, the project would still compile for Java 17, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features/compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the spring-boot.version property to 3.3.13 to match the parent POM version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Inconsistent version properties can lead to dependency resolution issues or runtime mismatches between managed dependencies and explicitly declared ones.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Replace legacy List.get(0) calls with the new List.getFirst() method introduced in Java 21.
Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 API.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/R.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to adopt Java 21 API.

src/test/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 convenience method.

src/test/java/org/mvnsearch/http/protoco.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API conventions.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
Replace deprecated List.get(int) with List.getFirst() to adopt Java 21 API.
